vocab.meaning: có quyền tự do làm gì (thỏa thích)
vocab.example: As a passenger, I am at liberty to daydream or scroll through my phone without any safety concerns.
I prefer being the driver because I like to have the upper hand when it comes to choosing the route and the music.

vocab.meaning: giữ sự tỉnh táo và nhạy bén để xử lý tình huống
vocab.example: Driving in heavy traffic requires you to keep your wits about you at all times to avoid accidents.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn, không làm việc nặng nhọc
vocab.example: I’d much rather be a passenger on long journeys so I can just take it easy and enjoy the music.

vocab.meaning: hưởng lợi từ điều gì đó
vocab.example: By letting my friend drive, I can reap the benefits of a stress-free trip and arrive at our destination feeling refreshed.

vocab.word: get into the swing of things
vocab.meaning: bắt đầu quen với và thích nghi với nhịp độ của công việc
vocab.example: Once I get into the swing of things on an open highway, I find driving to be quite a rhythmic and pleasant experience.

vocab.meaning: trút bỏ được gánh nặng lo âu
vocab.example: Not having to navigate through a strange city is a weight off my mind, which is why I prefer being a passenger in new places.

vocab.meaning: hưởng lợi từ cả hai tình huống khác nhau
vocab.example: Being a passenger allows me the best of both worlds: I get to travel in comfort while having zero responsibility for the vehicle.
When the roads are empty, being the driver is plain sailing and actually quite therapeutic for me.

vocab.meaning: như cá gặp nước/ở trong môi trường yêu thích
vocab.example: My brother is in his element behind the wheel, whereas I’m much happier reading a book in the back seat.
